title: Ender Pearl Craft 2
description: A simple mod that adds a recipe for deconstructing Eyes of Ender!
body:
🟣 Ender Pearl Craft
A simple mod that adds a recipe for deconstructing Eyes of Ender!

Ever crafted extra Eyes of Ender by mistake and don't know what to do with them? This mod solves that! It adds a crafting recipe that lets you break an Eye of Ender using Blaze Powder to recover your valuable Ender Pearl.

![dsa](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c81f4a24897d3cb602ee39a30429123d820b9c53.png)

🔧 Features:

Compatible with most mods.

Does not change other recipes or game mechanics.

Ideal for survival worlds to avoid wasting resources.

📦 Dependencies:

Fabric and Quilt: [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

💎 Never waste a resource again — deconstruct with ease!
